change.description: Add meteg under second nun.
change.refuni: nun hiriq shin shin-dot sheva alef patah mahapakh resh sheva nun vav dagesh
change.changeuni: nun hiriq shin shin-dot sheva alef patah mahapakh resh sheva nun meteg vav dagesh

notes.note: The mark below the second nun is much longer than would be expected for a meteg; however, the text quality is good.
BHL has a meteg on the second nun. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Add paseq at end of word.
change.refuni: yod vav holam ayin tsere munah final-tsadi
change.changeuni: yod vav holam ayin tsere munah final-tsadi paseq

notes.note: The paseq is clear. Do not mistake the following mark, a Masoretic spacer, as a maqaf.
BHL has a paseq at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Remove maqaf at end of word. (Rework of 2023.10.19 - Changes.xml, 2023.06.10 - 43)
change.refuni: lamed holam meteg alef maqaf
change.changeuni: lamed holam meteg alef

notes.note: A previous change, 2023.10.19 - Changes.xml, 2023.06.10 - 43, intended to remove the maqaf but failed to do so. The maqaf is removed with this change. [The '!' is a special marker to ensure that the transcription note 'm' is properly placed.]
BHL has a merkha under the lamed and no maqaf at the end of the word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

date.title: Corrections from Ben Denckla's list of contended words in Job.

change.description: Examine dagesh in yod. Add 't' note.
change.refuni: vav patah yod dagesh hiriq pe dagesh holam merkha lamed
change.changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh hiriq pe dagesh holam merkha lamed

notes.note: The dagesh in the yod touches, but is distinct from the yod. Add a 't' note.
BHL has a dagesh in the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine mem for possible dagesh.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot qamats zaqef-qatan mem qamats he
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot qamats zaqef-qatan mem qamats he

notes.note: No dagesh is present in the mem. The text is of high quality.
BHL has a dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no dagesh in the mem.

change.description: Examine accent on yod.
change.refuni: yod dehi vav holam final-mem
change.changeuni: yod dehi vav holam final-mem

notes.note: The yod has a dehi accent; the text is of high quality.
BHL has a dehi on the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine vowel under second mem.
change.refuni: mem hiriq mem dagesh qamats etnachta ayin patah lamed
change.changeuni: mem hiriq mem dagesh qamats etnachta ayin patah lamed

notes.note: The vowel under the second mem is a qamats.
BHL has a qamats under the second mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under alef.
change.refuni: alef mahapakh vav holam
change.changeuni: alef mahapakh vav holam

notes.note: The Accent is horizontally centered on the alef, making the accent a mahapakh rather than a dehi. The scribe had space before the alef for a dehi if intending to do so.
BHL has a mahapakh under the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on kaf.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh dehi vav holam shin shin-dot tsere lamed
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh dehi vav holam shin shin-dot tsere lamed

notes.note: The accent under the kaf is slightly forward of the center line of the kaf; if it had been centered on the kaf, it might be taken as a tipeha (tarha).
BHL has a dehi slightly forward of the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine he for possible mapiq.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah

notes.note: The final he has no dagesh acting as a mapiq; the text quality is good.
BHL has a dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he.

change.description: Examine he for mapiq.
change.refuni: mem tsere alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: mem tsere alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah

notes.note: The he has no dagesh acting as a mapiq.
BHL has a dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he.

change.description: * Examine tsadi for possible mapiq.
change.refuni: mem hiriq tsadi hiriq nun dagesh hiriq merkha yod final-mem
change.changeuni: mem hiriq tsadi hiriq nun dagesh hiriq merkha yod final-mem

notes.note: The tsadi has no dagesh acting as a mapiq; the text quality is good.
BHL has no dagesh acting as a mapiq. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine markings under bet for possible meteg after dehi and before sheva.
change.refuni: bet dagesh sheva dehi resh qamats ayin qamats bet
change.changeuni: bet dagesh sheva dehi resh qamats ayin qamats bet

notes.note: No meteg is present between the dehi accent and the sheva vowel. The text quality is good.
BHL has no meteg between the dehi accent and the sheva vowel. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine lamed for possible dagesh. Add note 't'.
change.refuni: lamed qamats meteg final-kaf sheva sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: lamed qamats meteg final-kaf sheva sof-pasuq

notes.note: The lamed has a very small dot near to the following kaf. The dot is smaller than other obviously intentional dots and off-centered from the usual dagesh position.
BHL has no dagesh in the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine kaf for possible revia.
change.refuni: nun qamats geresh-muqdam vav sheva final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: nun qamats geresh-muqdam vav sheva final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The black dot above the kaf is clearly part of the qamats in the preceding line.
BHL has no revia above the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine the marking under the vav and for a maqaf at end of word. Change the mark under the vav to meteg. Add note 'm'.
change.refuni: vav dagesh merkha tav sheva he hiriq yod
change.changeuni: vav dagesh meteg tav sheva he hiriq yod

notes.note: The line under the vav lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination to be a merkha. It's also rather short for a merkha. Change to meteg and add transcription note 'm'. There is no maqaf at end of this word.
BHL has a merkha under the vav and no maqaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine bet for dehi accent.
change.refuni: bet dagesh sheva dehi ayin tsere tav
change.changeuni: bet dagesh sheva dehi ayin tsere tav

notes.note: The dehi is well-marked and positioned.
BHL has a dehi on the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine qere as being the same as the ketiv.
change.refuni: lamed etnachta vav holam
change.changeuni: lamed etnachta vav holam

notes.note: A clear Masorah Circle appears over the ketiv (לֹ֑א) in the main text. The circle refers to the qere note in the right margin that gives the qere letters (לו). The resulting qere/ketiv pair agrees with the present text.
BHL has differing qere and ketivs for this word; both agree with the present text. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine maqaf-linked pair for accents. Replace meteg under kaf with merkha. Add note 'c' as the accent under the kaf could be taken as a meteg elsewhere.
change.refuni: resh tsere meteg yod ayin hataf-patah kaf segol meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: resh tsere meteg yod ayin hataf-patah kaf segol merkha final-mem sof-pasuq

notes.note: The preceding word has no accent and a connecting maqaf; the accent is on this word. The mark under the kaf is heavily inclined northeast-to-southwest and must be transcribed as a merkha in the UXLC. Add a transcription note 'c'.
BHL has no accent on the preceding word and a meteg under the resh and a meteg under the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under shin. Change merkha to meteg. Add note 'm'.
change.refuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh bet vav dagesh
change.changeuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot meteg vav dagesh bet vav dagesh

notes.note: This is the qere word of a qere/ketiv pair. The accent under the shin is too vertical to be considered a merkha here. Change merkha to meteg and add note 'm'.
BHL has a merkha under the shin; otherwise, it agrees with BHL. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine possible double accents (revia, tipeha) on the mem.
change.refuni: vav sheva kaf hiriq yod mem tsere tipeha revia yod
change.changeuni: vav sheva kaf hiriq yod mem tsere tipeha revia yod

notes.note: Above the mem are two dots and a crescent-shaped mark. One dot and the crescent-shaped mark are probably part of an incomplete Masorah Circle. The remaining dot would be a revia. The UXLC has a 'c' note on the mem.
BHL has no revia over the mem. BHLA has both a revia and a tipeha on this word.

change.description: Examine position of meteg acting as siluq relative to segol.
change.refuni: yod patah ayin hataf-patah lamed meteg CGJ segol he sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: yod patah ayin hataf-patah lamed meteg CGJ segol he sof-pasuq

notes.note: The meteg acting as siluq is inclined, but before the segol. The meteg is NOT from the text on the line below.
BHL has a meteg acting as a siluq after the segol. BHLA has a meteg acting as a siluq before the segol.

change.description: Examine the position of the ole accent; over the he or the alef.
change.refuni: he qamats alef qamats ole dalet qamats merkha final-mem
change.changeuni: he qamats alef qamats ole dalet qamats merkha final-mem

notes.note: The alef has a clear ole mark on top. The text quality is excellent.
BHL has an ole above the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for hataf-patah on het.
change.refuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot hiriq tipeha het hataf-patah resh sheva tav dagesh patah munah nun hiriq yod
change.changeuni: vav sheva shin shin-dot hiriq tipeha het hataf-patah resh sheva tav dagesh patah munah nun hiriq yod

notes.note: The hataf-patah under the het is clear. The text is in good condition.
BHL has a patah under the het. BHLA has a hataf-patah under the het.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in yod.
change.refuni: vav patah yod holam alef mem patah meteg resh sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: vav patah yod holam alef mem patah meteg resh sof-pasuq

notes.note: No dagesh is present in the yod. The text quality is excellent.
BHL has a dagesh in the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for revia over bet.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh patah geresh-muqdam bet dagesh hiriq yod resh
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh patah geresh-muqdam bet dagesh hiriq yod resh

notes.note: No revia is apparent over the bet. The text quality is excellent.
BHL has no revia over the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine dagesh acting as a shuruq in the vav.
change.refuni: vav dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam alef patah het hataf-patah resh hiriq yod tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia
change.changeuni: vav dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam alef patah het hataf-patah resh hiriq yod tav sheva final-kaf qamats revia

notes.note: The dagesh is not as dark as other dots in this word; however, it is well-positioned.
BHL has no dagesh acting as a shuruq in the vav. BHLA has a dagesh acting as a shuruq in the vav.

change.description: * Examine for revia above the bet. Remove revia.
change.refuni: ayin patah geresh-muqdam kaf dagesh qamats bet hiriq revia yod shin shin-dot
change.changeuni: ayin patah geresh-muqdam kaf dagesh qamats bet hiriq yod shin shin-dot

notes.note: The text has a rafe above the bet. (The UXLC doesn't usually display rafe marks.) Remove the revia.
BHL has a revia above the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under he (dehi, tipeha).
change.refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
change.changeuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef

notes.note: The accent mark appears before the centerline of the he and is therefore a dehi, rather than a tipeha,
BHL has a dehi accent. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under yod (meteg, dehi). Change meteg to dehi.
change.refuni: yod holam meteg nun patah qof sheva tav dagesh merkha vav holam
change.changeuni: yod holam dehi nun patah qof sheva tav dagesh merkha vav holam

notes.note: The mark under the yod has a distinct northwest-to-southeast inclination and is displaced forward of the centerline of the yod. The mark under the yod is a dehi.
BHL has a meteg under the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in pe.
change.refuni: yod hiriq tav sheva pe patah lamed dagesh qamats tsadi meteg vav dagesh final-nun sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: yod hiriq tav sheva pe patah lamed dagesh qamats tsadi meteg vav dagesh final-nun sof-pasuq

notes.note: No dagesh appears in the pe.
BHL has a dagesh in the pe. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for geresh-muqdam on initial vav.
change.refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam nun hiriq pe sheva lamed qamats alef revia vav holam tav
change.changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam nun hiriq pe sheva lamed qamats alef revia vav holam tav

notes.note: The text is chipped and of low quality for this word. Two parallel lines can be seen slightly to the top left of the vav. If filled, they would constitute a gersh-muqdam. The UXLC accepts the gersh-muqdam, but adds a transcription note 't'.
BHL has no accent on the initial vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine mem for meteg acting as a siluq.
change.refuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh vav holam sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh vav holam sof-pasuq

notes.note: Two light dots appear under the mem; neither can be taken as part of a meteg. The UXLC has a 't' note on the mem.
BHL has a meteg under the mem. BHLA has a question mark in parentheses, "(?)", and no meteg under the mem.

change.description: * Examine for meteg acting as siluq under the pe.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh patah pe dagesh qamats yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh patah pe dagesh qamats yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: No meteg under the pe is apparent. The UXLC has a note, 't', on this word.
BHL has a meteg acting as siluq under the pe. BHLA has a question mark in parentheses, "(?)", and no meteg acting as siluq.

change.description: Examine the markings under the alef.
change.refuni: alef patah meteg dehi dalet patah bet dagesh sheva resh qamats he
change.changeuni: alef patah meteg dehi dalet patah bet dagesh sheva resh qamats he

notes.note: No sheva is visible in the text. The leading mark is a dehi as it is distinctly advanced from the centerline of the alef.
BHL has dehi, sheva, meteg, and patah under the alef. The meteg breaks a possible hataf patah. BHLA has a dehi, patah, and meteg under the alef.

change.description: Examine word for revia on the he.
change.refuni: alef hataf-patah geresh-muqdam dalet patah bet dagesh sheva resh qamats he revia
change.changeuni: alef hataf-patah geresh-muqdam dalet patah bet dagesh sheva resh qamats he revia

notes.note: The he has a rafe mark, not shown in UXLC, and a dot. The dot is not part of the previous line of text and can be taken as a revia.
BHL has a revia over the resh. BHLA has a revia over the he.

change.description: * Examine marking under the vav as meteg or tipeha. Add transcription note 't'.
change.refuni: vav dagesh meteg lamed sheva het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq meteg yod
change.changeuni: vav dagesh meteg lamed sheva het patah tet dagesh qamats alef tav hiriq meteg yod

notes.note: The mark under the vav has a very slight northwest-to-southeast inclination and might be taken as dehi. Add transcription note 't' to indicate this uncertainty.
BHL has a meteg under the vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine markings under the first yod. Change meteg to merkha and add transcription note 'c'.
change.refuni: ayin qamats nun sheva yod meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: ayin qamats nun sheva yod merkha ZWJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: Under the first yod is a sloping line followed by a hiriq. The line slopes significantly in the northeast-to-southwest orientation as a merkha. Although the accent probably was intended to be a meteg, the UXLC transcription must make it a merkha for consistency.
BHL has a hiriq, then meteg under the first yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine vav for meteg acting as shuruq in vav.
change.refuni: yod patah het hataf-patah resh hiriq etnachta yod shin shin-dot vav
change.changeuni: yod patah het hataf-patah resh hiriq etnachta yod shin shin-dot vav

notes.note: No meteg acting as shuruq in the vav is apparent. The text quality is excellent.
BHL has a meteg acting as shuruq in vav. BHLA has no meteg acting as shureq in vav.

change.description: Examine he for dagesh acting as mapiq.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he patah

notes.note: No dot appears in the he. The text quality is excellent.
BHL has a dagesh acting as mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as mapiq in he.

change.description: Examine for dagesh acting as mapiq in the he.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah

notes.note: No dagesh acting as mapiq is apparent in the he.
BHL has a dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he.

change.description: * Examine for revia over the tav.
change.refuni: alef patah dehi tav dagesh qamats revia he
change.changeuni: alef patah dehi tav dagesh qamats revia he

notes.note: A clear, dark dot appears over the tav; it is a revia.
BHL has no revia over the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for maqaf after tav.
change.refuni: vav sheva alef segol tav
change.changeuni: vav sheva alef segol tav

notes.note: The image shows the word (9) and its following two words. No maqaf is evident between words 9 and 10; that is, the tav is not followed by a maqaf. A maqaf is present between words 10 and 11, however.
BHL has a maqaf following the tav. BHLA has no maqaf following the tav.

change.description: Examine accent on vav.
change.refuni: yod sheva geresh-muqdam he vav qamats he
change.changeuni: yod sheva geresh-muqdam he vav qamats he

notes.note: No accent appears above the vav. The text quality is good.
BHL has no accent above the vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for meteg on tav. Add transcription note 't'.
change.refuni: vav sheva tav meteg vav dagesh shin shin-dot hiriq yod dagesh qamats etnachta he
change.changeuni: vav sheva tav meteg vav dagesh shin shin-dot hiriq yod dagesh qamats etnachta he

notes.note: A blob of ink lies beneath the tav. It is only slightly rectangular and vertically oriented. It is NOT part of Job 12:17.1 below it that has a yod without markings. Add transcription note 't'.
BHL has no meteg on the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine accent below alef, meteg or tipeha.
change.refuni: vav sheva alef tsere tipeha tav qamats nun hiriq munah yod final-mem
change.changeuni: vav sheva alef tsere tipeha tav qamats nun hiriq munah yod final-mem

notes.note: The accent below the alef has the diagonal, northwest-to-southeast orientation of a tipeha.
BHL has a tipeha below the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine markings on the yod.
change.refuni: mem tsere resh tsere munah yod dagesh patah het
change.changeuni: mem tsere resh tsere munah yod dagesh patah het

notes.note: The dagesh in the yod is clear. The patah is unusually forward of the het to be a furtive patah..
BHL has no dagesh in the yod; the patah belongs to the het (furtive patah). BHLA has a dagesh in the yod; the patah belongs to the yod.

change.description: * Examine accent on shin: merkha or meteg.
change.refuni: tav dagesh qamats mahapakh shin shin-dot hiriq meteg yod tav
change.changeuni: tav dagesh qamats mahapakh shin shin-dot hiriq meteg yod tav

notes.note: The line below the shin is vertical, it lacks the southeast-to-northwest inclination to be a merkha. The UXLC acknowledges the possibility of a merkha with a note 'm'.
BHL has a merkha below the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh acting as mapiq in he.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol lamed munah vav holam he patah

notes.note: No dagesh acting as a mapiq is present in the he. The text is of good quality.
BHL has a dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as mapiq in the he.

change.description: * Examine markings under the shin.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot holam meteg merkha het patah dalet sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot holam meteg merkha het patah dalet sof-pasuq

notes.note: Although the text quality is not good, a meteg then merkha are present under the shin.
BHL has only a meteg on the shin. BHLA has a meteg then merkha on the shin.

change.description: * Examine markings under the yod: patah, munah.
change.refuni: vav sheva yod qamats lamed holam dalet
change.changeuni: vav sheva yod qamats lamed holam dalet

notes.note: The text is in bad condition and cluttered. At least a qamats is evident under the yod. The horizontal line of the qamats appears to be extended; however, the extension cannot be mistaken for a munah. The UXLC has a 't' note indicating the problem.
BHL has a patah then munah under the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine maqaf on word.
change.refuni: lamed mahapakh vav dagesh maqaf
change.changeuni: lamed mahapakh vav dagesh maqaf

notes.note: The maqaf is present following the vav.
BHL has no maqaf following the vav. BHLA has a maqaf following the vav.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in mem.
change.refuni: mem patah he maqaf
change.changeuni: mem patah he maqaf

notes.note: No dagesh appears in mem.
BHL has no dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for a meteg acting as a siluq on the resh.
change.refuni: mem sheva resh tsere resh qamats meteg tav hiriq yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: mem sheva resh tsere resh qamats meteg tav hiriq yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: A meteg acting as a siluq appears under the resh.
BHL has a meteg acting as a siluq under the tav, NOT the resh. BHLA has a meteg acting as a siluq under the resh.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in he. Add dagesh to he.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he dagesh patah

notes.note: A dagesh is dark and well-positioned in he. Add the dagesh to the text.
BHL has a dagesh in the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine vowel under the ayin: patah, qamats. Change qamats to patah and add note 't'.
change.refuni: ayin qamats resh sheva bet tsere munah nun hiriq yod
change.changeuni: ayin patah resh sheva bet tsere munah nun hiriq yod

notes.note: The ayin has a very dark and clear horizontal bar sufficient for either a patah or qamats. A faint, but well positioned dot is below the bar, sufficient to be a qamats. Change qamats to patah and add transcription note 't'.
BHL has a qamats under the ayin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in mem. Remove dagesh and add note 't'.
change.refuni: mem dagesh hiriq shin sin-dot dagesh qamats etnachta kaf segol lamed
change.changeuni: mem hiriq shin sin-dot dagesh qamats etnachta kaf segol lamed

notes.note: The text is of poor quality with chipped ink. A smudge appears in the mem that might have been dagesh or an erased dagesh. Other dots in the area are darker. Remove dagesh in mem and add transcription note 't'.
BHL has a dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in tav. Add dagesh to tav.
change.refuni: vav sheva tav holam tipeha pe segol tav
change.changeuni: vav sheva tav holam tipeha pe segol tav dagesh

notes.note: The tav contains a dark and well-positioned dot. Add dagesh to tav.
BHL has no dagesh in the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine second bet for possible dagesh. Add dagesh to second bet.
change.refuni: lamed sheva bet qamats bet hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: lamed sheva bet qamats bet dagesh hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: Although the text quality is not good, a very dark and well-positioned dagesh appears in the second bet. Add dagesh to second bet.
BHL has no dagesh in the second bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine markings below he: dehi, hataf-patah or dehi, patah.
change.refuni: he hataf-patah dehi lamed sheva mem dagesh patah ayin patah nun sheva final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: he hataf-patah dehi lamed sheva mem dagesh patah ayin patah nun sheva final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The text is of poor quality. The outline of the patah is distinct and well positioned; the ink appears to have fallen off. The sheva of a hataf-patah is clear, the dehi is the best formed of the 3 markings.
BHL has a dehi then patah under the he. BHLA has dehi, hataf-patah under the he.

change.description: * Examine for dagesh in mem.
change.refuni: he hataf-patah dehi lamed sheva mem dagesh patah ayin patah nun sheva final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: he hataf-patah dehi lamed sheva mem dagesh patah ayin patah nun sheva final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The dagesh in the mem is dark and well-positioned. The text quality is poor.
BHL has no dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no dagesh in the mem.

change.description: * Examine for dehi or tipeha under alef.
change.refuni: alef tipeha vav holam resh
change.changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam resh

notes.note: The northwest-to-southeast inclined line under the alef is either a dehi or tipeha, depending on horizontal positioning relative to the alef. The line is not sufficiently prepositive to be taken as a dehi, it will be transcribed as a tipeha. The UXLC has a transcription note 'd' on this letter.
BHL has a dehi under the alef . BHLA has a tipeha under the alef.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in ayin. Add dagesh to ayin.
change.refuni: bet dagesh sheva ayin qamats qof tsere munah bet
change.changeuni: bet dagesh sheva ayin dagesh qamats qof tsere munah bet

notes.note: A dark dot appears in the ayin. The dot is a little off-center, but must be taken as a dagesh. (The letter ayin conventionally doesn't take a dagesh.)
BHL has no dagesh in ayin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine sheva under kaf.
change.refuni: vav dagesh meteg tav sheva dalet patah kaf dagesh alef vav dagesh nun patah merkha nun hiriq yod
change.changeuni: vav dagesh meteg tav sheva dalet patah kaf dagesh alef vav dagesh nun patah merkha nun hiriq yod

notes.note: This is a poorly written word with low text quality. A dark and reasonably well-positioned dot appears in the kaf; it should be taken as a dagesh.
BHL has a dagesh in the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine tav for dagesh (and rafe).
change.refuni: het segol resh sheva pe dagesh qamats tav dagesh hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: het segol resh sheva pe dagesh qamats tav dagesh hiriq meteg yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: A mis-shapen blob occurs in the resh that might be taken as a dagesh; it will be ignored. The dagesh in the pe is small, but clear. The dagesh in the tav is unusually light, but well-formed and well-positioned. The rafe on the tav is very clear. (A letter should not have both a dagesh and a rafe.) Retain the dagesh in the tav and add transcription note 't'.
BHL has no dagesh in the tav or resh; it doesn't normally display rafe marks. BHLA has a dagesh and a rafe on the tav and no dagesh on the resh.

change.description: * Examine qof for possible dagesh.
change.refuni: qof dagesh qamats dehi resh qamats alef tav hiriq yod
change.changeuni: qof dagesh qamats dehi resh qamats alef tav hiriq yod

notes.note: The dot in the qof is well-formed and well-positioned; it will be taken as a dagesh.
BHL has no dagesh in the qof. BHLA has a dagesh in the qof and a question mark in parentheses, "(?)".

change.description: Examine for accent above bet. [First part of 2 part change.]
change.refuni: bet dagesh sheva mem vav holam maqaf
change.changeuni: bet dagesh sheva mem vav holam maqaf

notes.note: The image shows both parts of a maqaf-joined pair, this word is the first in the pair. No accent appears above the bet.
BHL has no accent above the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine if pe has a gersh-muqdam and a revia. [Part 2 of previous change] Change accent order to revia then geresh-muqdam; include ZWJ to achieve display or ordering. Add transcription note 't'.
change.refuni: pe hiriq geresh-muqdam revia yod
change.changeuni: pe hiriq revia ZWJ geresh-muqdam yod

notes.note: The image shows both parts of a maqaf-joined pair, this word is the second in the pair. A geresh-muqdam over the pe is clear; it is preceded by a small dot that may be a revia. Add transcription note 't'. Note that the putative revia appears before the geresh-muqdam in the image. Place the revia before the gerseh-muqdam; adding a zero-width-joiner (ZWJ, x200d) between them to achieve the ordering in the display.
BHL has a geresh-muqdam and a revia in that order. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Determine accent on the tav: dehi or tipeha. Add note 't' as pre-positive positioning is weak.
change.refuni: tav holam dehi alef mem sheva resh vav dagesh
change.changeuni: tav holam dehi alef mem sheva resh vav dagesh

notes.note: The accent on the tav is dark and well-formed; the question is whether it is sufficiently pre-positive to be a dehi. Add note 't'.
BHL has a dehi on the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine whether the meteg is on the he or the nun.
change.refuni: he patah nun dagesh patah meteg ayin hataf-patah mem qamats tav hiriq revia yod
change.changeuni: he patah nun dagesh patah meteg ayin hataf-patah mem qamats tav hiriq revia yod

notes.note: The meteg is clearly on the nun after the patah.
BHL has the meteg on the nun after the patah. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine if the bet has a dagesh and the type of accent: dehi, tipeha.
change.refuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam
change.changeuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam

notes.note: The bet has two dots within it. the small, dark vertically-centered dot is the dagesh; the lighter, larger lower dot is likely an imperfection. The accent is pre-positive and; therefore, a dehi.
BHL has a dagesh in the bet and a dehi below it. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine position (mem, dalet) and type of accent: dehi or munah.
change.refuni: mem patah dalet dagesh munah vav dagesh ayin patah
change.changeuni: mem patah dalet dagesh munah vav dagesh ayin patah

notes.note: A clear munah appears under the dalet.
BHL has a munah under the dalet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in the shin.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod

notes.note: No dagesh is present in the shin.
BHL has no dagesh in the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in shin.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod

notes.note: The shin does not have a dagesh.
BHL has no dagesh in the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine vowel on vav: sheva or hiriq.
change.refuni: vav hiriq lamed holam meteg alef maqaf
change.changeuni: vav hiriq lamed holam meteg alef maqaf

notes.note: The hiriq dot is brownish and ill-positioned. The UXLC text already has a note 't'.
BHL has a sheva under the vav. BHLA has a hiriq under the vav.

change.description: * Examine accent under the shin: meteg or merkha.
change.refuni: vav dagesh geresh-muqdam tav sheva shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh bet holam tav tsere yod kaf segol revia final-mem
change.changeuni: vav dagesh geresh-muqdam tav sheva shin shin-dot merkha vav dagesh bet holam tav tsere yod kaf segol revia final-mem

notes.note: The shin has a clear and well-made merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible accent on final kaf.
change.refuni: vav hiriq meteg geresh-muqdam yod bet patah he segol lamed sheva final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: vav hiriq meteg geresh-muqdam yod bet patah he segol lamed sheva final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The text is in poor condition. A weak rafe appears over the final kaf. No dot appears over the final kaf suggesting a revia.
BHL has no accent on the final kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on the resh: dehi or tipeha. Add note 't'.
change.refuni: resh holam tipeha alef shin shin-dot
change.changeuni: resh holam tipeha alef shin shin-dot

notes.note: The mark under the resh could be either a dehi or tipeha depending on its position relative to the resh. Space was available for the scribe to make the mark more pre-positive; hence, the accent is taken as a tipeha. Add note 't'.
BHL has a tipeha under the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under lamed: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: lamed dehi vav holam
change.changeuni: lamed dehi vav holam

notes.note: The accent on the lamed is either a tipeha or a dehi. The mark is sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the mem: munah or etnachta.
change.refuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh etnachta vav holam
change.changeuni: ayin hiriq mem dagesh etnachta vav holam

notes.note: The accent below the mem is an etnachta.
BHL has a munah below the mem. BHLA has an etnachta below the mem and a question mark in parentheses, "(?)".

change.description: * Examine markings below the lamed.
change.refuni: vav dagesh shin shin-dot sheva lamed final-mem
change.changeuni: vav dagesh shin shin-dot sheva lamed final-mem

notes.note: A very faint merkha or etnachta can be seen under the lamed. It is much lighter than surrounding text and may have been an erasure. It's too faint to be transcribed.
BHL has an etnachta under the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine whether the second letter is a bet or a kaf. The dagesh in the initial vav is weak; add note 't'.
change.refuni: vav dagesh bet sheva tsadi tipeha vav dagesh resh
change.changeuni: vav dagesh bet sheva tsadi tipeha vav dagesh resh

notes.note: The text is of poor quality around this word. The second letter has the lower near-horizonal line protruding forward of the vertical line. The dagesh on the initial vav is very small, add note 't' to the initial vav.
BHL has a bet as the second letter; it has a dagesh in the initial vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine accent below the alef: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: alef tipeha vav holam mem segol resh
change.changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam mem segol resh

notes.note: The accent below the alef is not sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi. It will be transcribed as a tipeha.
BHL has a dehi below the alef. BHLA has a tipeha below the alef.

change.description: * Examine markings under the yod: sheva or meteg then sheva. Remove meteg (and its CGJ) and add note 't'.
change.refuni: yod meteg CGJ sheva mem patah lamed dagesh tsere merkha tet
change.changeuni: yod sheva mem patah lamed dagesh tsere merkha tet

notes.note: The sheva under the yod is apparent; determining what to do with the line/blob before the sheva is the problem. The near-vertical line before the sheva is too long to be a meteg and ends with an out of place dot. Accept the sheva as real; add transcription note 't'.
BHL has a sheva without a preceding meteg under the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in nun. Add dagesh to nun.
change.refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam nun hiriq mem sheva lamed patah revia tet
change.changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam nun dagesh hiriq mem sheva lamed patah revia tet

notes.note: The nun has a small, but dark and well-positioned, dagesh in the nun.
BHL has no dagesh in nun. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for maqaf at end of word.
change.refuni: mem patah he maqaf
change.changeuni: mem patah he maqaf

notes.note: The image shows this word and its successor. The maqaf between the he and the vav of the next word is clear.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of the word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent below kaf: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het patah
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het patah

notes.note: The accent below the kaf is sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi below the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine shin for possible dagesh.
change.refuni: mem hiriq dehi shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah yod
change.changeuni: mem hiriq dehi shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah yod

notes.note: The space between the fingers of the shin has assorted blemishes and a dot in the second gap. None of these feature are sufficiently well-formed or well-positioned to transcribe as a sheva.
BHL has no dagesh in the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine markings below the bet: patah then meteg or patah then merkha.
change.refuni: bet dagesh patah merkha mem dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh qamats revia resh
change.changeuni: bet dagesh patah merkha mem dagesh hiriq dalet sheva bet dagesh qamats revia resh

notes.note: The patah then merkha below the bet are clear. The merkha has a slight northeast-to-southwest inclination adequate to be transcribed as a merkha.
BHL has a patah the merkha below the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine possible maqaf at end of this word.
change.refuni: bet dagesh sheva meteg mem holam resh sheva dalet tsere ole yod maqaf
change.changeuni: bet dagesh sheva meteg mem holam resh sheva dalet tsere ole yod maqaf

notes.note: The image shows this word and its successor. The maqaf between the yod of this word and the alef of the following word is clear.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible dagesh in the dalet. Add dagesh to dalet.
change.refuni: yod qamats merkha dalet sheva ayin vav dagesh
change.changeuni: yod qamats merkha dalet dagesh sheva ayin vav dagesh

notes.note: The dalet has a dark, well-sized, well-positioned dagesh in dalet. Add dagesh to dalet.
BHL has no dagesh in the dalet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine possible revia over nun.
change.refuni: yod hiriq geresh-muqdam pe sheva nun segol he
change.changeuni: yod hiriq geresh-muqdam pe sheva nun segol he

notes.note: The nun has no revia above it.
BHL has no revia over nun. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine vowel under ayin: tsere or segol. Add note 't'.
change.refuni: resh holam ayin tsere munah he
change.changeuni: resh holam ayin tsere munah he

notes.note: The ayin has two very dark and well-positioned dots under the ayin. Under these two dots is a very faint, slightly off-centered dot. Retain the tsere and add transcription note 't'.
BHL has a segol under the ayin. BHLA has a tsere under the ayin and a question mark in parentheses, "(?)".

change.description: Examine possible vav between resh and tav; yod between tav and last letter.
change.refuni: gimel dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam bet vav dagesh resh vav holam tav qamats revia yod vav
change.changeuni: gimel dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam bet vav dagesh resh vav holam tav qamats revia yod vav

notes.note: The image shows the qere/ketiv forms for this word both in the body text (ketiv) and in the left margin beneath a dotted qof (qere). The letters for the qere form are found in the left margin of the LC. The qere has a vav between the resh and tav; it has a yod between the tav and the yod. The letters for the ketiv appear in the body text. They lack the vav between the resh and tav and the yod between the tav and vav. This is a conventional qere/ketiv pair; the ketiv appears in the preceding word in the UXLC.

BHL qere has a vav between the resh and the tav, the vav has a holam dot, a yod is present between the tav and the vav. the BHL ketiv has no vav between the resh and the tav; it has no yod between the tav and the last letter, a vav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for maqaf at end of word.
change.refuni: het patah yod
change.changeuni: het patah yod

notes.note: No maqaf appears at the end of this word.
BHL has a maqaf at the end of this word. BHLA has no maqaf at the end of this word.

change.description: Examine vowel under he: patah or hataf-patah.
change.refuni: he patah meteg dehi tsadi patah ayin hataf-patah qof qamats tav vav holam
change.changeuni: he patah meteg dehi tsadi patah ayin hataf-patah qof qamats tav vav holam

notes.note: No sheva component for a hataf-patah appears under the he.
BHL has a patah under the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for dagesh in shin.
change.refuni: mem hiriq shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod
change.changeuni: mem hiriq shin shin-dot patah dalet dagesh patah merkha yod

notes.note: The text is of good quality here. No dagesh appears in the shin.
BHL has no dagesh in the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible vowel (hiriq) on resh.
change.refuni: he hiriq dalet sheva resh hiriq yod kaf qubuts merkha he vav dagesh
change.changeuni: he hiriq dalet sheva resh hiriq yod kaf qubuts merkha he vav dagesh

notes.note: No vowel (or accent) appears under the resh. The dot at the lower border under the resh is a shin-dot from the following line. Its too far from the resh to be a vowel on the resh.
BHL has a hiriq under the resh. BHLA has no hiriq under the resh.

change.description: Examine accent under he: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
change.changeuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef

notes.note: The accent under the he is forward of the horizontal center line of the he, slightly pre-positive, and therefore a dehi.
BHL has a dehi on the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine holam dot on sin.
change.refuni: bet dagesh patah ayin hataf-patah shin sin-dot holam tav munah vav holam
change.changeuni: bet dagesh patah ayin hataf-patah shin sin-dot holam tav munah vav holam

notes.note: Both a sin-dot and holam are apparent from the image. The text is of good quality.
BHL has a holam dot on the sin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on the resh: geresh-muqdam.
change.refuni: lamed sheva geresh-muqdam alef vav holam resh vav holam
change.changeuni: lamed sheva geresh-muqdam alef vav holam resh vav holam

notes.note: No marking appears on the resh.
BHL has no accent on the resh; it has a geresh muqdam on the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine second shin for possible revia accent.
change.refuni: vav hiriq meteg geresh-muqdam yod shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot hiriq yod final-mem
change.changeuni: vav hiriq meteg geresh-muqdam yod shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot hiriq yod final-mem

notes.note: The second shin has no accent. The vertical bar and dot at the upper border are from the previous line. The vav has a geresh-muqdam, however.
BHL has no accent on the second shin; the vav has a geresh-muqdam, however. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine vowel on yod.
change.refuni: vav sheva ayin patah merkha yod final-nun
change.changeuni: vav sheva ayin patah merkha yod final-nun

notes.note: No markings at all appear on the yod.
BHL has a hiriq on the yod. BHLA has no hiriq on the yod.

change.description: * Examine order of meteg, hiriq markings below resh.
change.refuni: bet dagesh hiriq qof sheva tsadi hiriq yod resh meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: bet dagesh hiriq qof sheva tsadi hiriq yod resh meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: The markings below the resh are meteg then hiriq.
BHL has hiriq then meteg below resh. BHLA has meteg then hiriq below resh.

change.description: Examine accent below kaf: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het patah
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het patah

notes.note: The accent under the kaf is sufficiently advanced to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine the accent under the resh: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: resh tipeha vav dagesh het patah
change.changeuni: resh tipeha vav dagesh het patah

notes.note: The accent is not sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi. The existing UXLC text has a note 'd' indicating the possibility that this might be a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the ayin: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: ayin dehi vav holam resh hiriq yod
change.changeuni: ayin dehi vav holam resh hiriq yod

notes.note: The accent under the ayin is sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the ayin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for paseq following this word.
change.refuni: vav dagesh mem segol mahapakh he space paseq
change.changeuni: vav dagesh mem segol mahapakh he space paseq

notes.note: The paseq is dark and well-positioned after the he.
BHL has a paseq following this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the he: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
change.changeuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef

notes.note: The mark under the he is pre-positive and; therefore, a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine order of markings under the lamed: meteg then hiriq or hiriq then meteg.
change.refuni: resh patah gimel sheva lamed meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: resh patah gimel sheva lamed meteg CGJ hiriq yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: The mark order in the image under the lamed is meteg then hiriq.
BHL has hiriq then meteg under the lamed. BHLA has a meteg then hiriq under the lamed.

change.description: * Examine for meteg under the vav.
change.refuni: mem qubuts alef vav dagesh meteg final-mem sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: mem qubuts alef vav dagesh meteg final-mem sof-pasuq

notes.note: A slightly inclined meteg occurs under the vav in the image.
BHL has no meteg under the vav. BHLA has a meteg under the vav.

change.description: Examine he for geresh-muqdam accent; examine order of markings below the he. Add note 't' as geresh-muqdam is ill-formed. Change the Unicode characters for the markings below the he to produce the same image without misusing the hataf-patah character.
change.refuni: he hataf-patah ZWJ meteg geresh-muqdam lamed holam alef maqaf
change.changeuni: he sheva meteg CGJ patah geresh-muqdam lamed holam alef maqaf

notes.note: The image shows somewhat lighter, yet distinct, vertical straight line arising from the top front of the he. It has a very odd shape for a geresh-muqdam. The order of the markings below the he is sheva then meteg then patah; no complete hataf-patah is present. Change the Unicode characters below the he to sheva then meteg then CGJ then patah to preserve appearance and eliminate the dubious use of the Unicode hataf patah character. Add a note 't' indicating transcription problem with geresh-muqdam marking. For technical reasons the change type must be set to vowel/accent to change the Unicode characters, even though the visible text under the he is unchanged.
BHL has no geresh-muqdam on the he; the order of the markings below the he is sheva then meteg then patah. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent below the alef: dehi or tipeha. Change dehi to tipeha.
change.refuni: alef dehi vav holam bet tsere dalet
change.changeuni: alef tipeha vav holam bet tsere dalet

notes.note: The accent below the alef is not sufficiently pre-positive to be considered a dehi and space was available to make it more pre-positive. The accent will be changed to a tipeha.
BHL has a dehi below the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for revia over sin.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam bet qamats shin sin-dot patah yod
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh sheva geresh-muqdam bet qamats shin sin-dot patah yod

notes.note: The sin has no revia on top of it, even though space is available.
BHL has no revia over the sin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the he: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
change.changeuni: he tipeha vav dagesh alef

notes.note: The image shows this word and the preceding word. The maqaf between these two words is hardly visible. The mark under the he is not sufficiently pre-positive to be considered a dehi. Change dehi to tipeha and add note 'd'.
BHL has a dehi under the he; it has a maqaf between this word and the preceding word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine markings on the vav and nun: which letter has the meteg.
change.refuni: ayin hataf-patah vav holam-haser meteg nun hiriq yod sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: ayin hataf-patah vav holam-haser meteg nun hiriq yod sof-pasuq

notes.note: Beneath the vav is an inclined vertical line intended as a meteg; the vav also has a holam. The only mark below the nun is a hiriq.
BHL has a only a holam on the vav and a hiriq then meteg under the nun. BHLA has the meteg under the vav and a hiriq under the nun.

change.description: Examine accent under the kaf: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het qamats he dagesh
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh holam dehi het qamats he dagesh

notes.note: The mark below the kaf is sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the kaf. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine position of marks below the shin: etnachta then hiriq or hiriq then etnachta.
change.refuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot etnachta ZWJ hiriq yod final-mem
change.changeuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot hiriq yod shin shin-dot etnachta ZWJ hiriq yod final-mem

notes.note: The etnachta precedes the hiriq under the shin.
BHL has hiriq then etnachta under the shin . BHLA has etnachta then hiriq under the shin.

change.description: * Examine dalet for possible dagesh.
change.refuni: dalet tsere ayin hiriq munah yod
change.changeuni: dalet tsere ayin hiriq munah yod

notes.note: No dagesh appears in the dalet. The text quality is very good.
BHL has no dagesh in the dalet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for paseq at end of word.
change.refuni: he vav holam het patah qadma lamed sheva tav dagesh hiriq yod
change.changeuni: he vav holam het patah qadma lamed sheva tav dagesh hiriq yod

notes.note: The image shows the word in question and the following word. No paseq is apparent between the yod at the end of this word and the initial lamed of the next word.
BHL has no paseq at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine he for possible dagesh acting as mapiq.
change.refuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he patah
change.changeuni: alef hataf-segol geresh-muqdam lamed revia vav holam he patah

notes.note: The text is of good quality. No dagesh acting as a mapiq is present in the he.
BHL has a dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he. BHLA has no dagesh acting as a mapiq in the he.

change.description: Examine for possible revia over tav.
change.refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam het patah yod dagesh qamats tav vav holam
change.changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam het patah yod dagesh qamats tav vav holam

notes.note: This qere word has a rafe mark (not shown in BHL or UXLC), but no revia over the tav.
BHL has no revia over the tav in the qere form in the left margin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible meteg acting as siluq under the he and for possible meteg under the first yod.
change.refuni: he patah meteg het patah yod dagesh hiriq yod final-mem sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: he patah meteg het patah yod dagesh hiriq yod final-mem sof-pasuq

notes.note: The text quality is good. The meteg acting as a siluq under the he is unusually long. No meteg acting as siluq appears under the first yod.

BHL has a patah then meteg acting as a siluq under the he. It also has a meteg acting as a siluq after the hiriq under the first yod. BHLA has a patah then meteg acting as a siluq under the he. It has only a hiriq under the first yod.

change.description: Examine accent structure: dehi under alef or munah under mem.
change.refuni: alef qamats dehi mem patah resh
change.changeuni: alef qamats dehi mem patah resh

notes.note: A dehi is clear and well-positioned in front of the alef; the mem has no accent. The text quality is good.
BHL has a dehi on the alef and no accent on the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on alef: meteg or merkha. Change merkha to meteg under the alef. Add note 'm'.
change.refuni: alef patah merkha nun hataf-patah shin shin-dot tsere merkha yod
change.changeuni: alef patah meteg nun hataf-patah shin shin-dot tsere merkha yod

notes.note: The accent on the alef is a meteg; it lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination of a merkha. Change merkha to meteg. Add note 'm' because BHL sees a merkha.
BHL has a merkha under the alef. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in nun.
change.refuni: nun qamats shin sin-dot qamats qadma alef space paseq
change.changeuni: nun qamats shin sin-dot qamats qadma alef space paseq

notes.note: No dagesh is apparent in the nun. The text quality is good.
BHL has no dagesh in the nun. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on shin: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot dehi vav holam ayin patah
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot dehi vav holam ayin patah

notes.note: The accent below the shin could be either a dehi or a merkha, depending on its horizontal position. The accent is sufficiently pre-positive to be a dehi.
BHL has a dehi on the shin. BHLA has an entry for this verse corresponding to the 7-th word (נִכַּר־).

change.description: Examine the accent on the het: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: het holam dehi shin shin-dot segol final-kaf sheva
change.changeuni: het holam dehi shin shin-dot segol final-kaf sheva

notes.note: The accent on the het is a dehi or a tipeha depending on its horizontal position relative to the het. The tail of a lamed from the line below precludes the accent being centered on the het, which would make it a tipeha. Because the accent is slightly pre-positive, the accent will be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi on the het. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for vowel on he: patah or hataf-patah.
change.refuni: he patah meteg mem tsere ayin hiriq mem dagesh sheva final-kaf qamats iluy
change.changeuni: he patah meteg mem tsere ayin hiriq mem dagesh sheva final-kaf qamats iluy

notes.note: The image shows a patah then meteg under the he.
BHL has a patah then meteg under the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in lamed.
change.refuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot patah lamed sheva mem segol qadma nun dagesh qamats he
change.changeuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot patah lamed sheva mem segol qadma nun dagesh qamats he

notes.note: No dagesh is present in the lamed.
BHL has no dagesh in the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for paseq at end of this word.
change.refuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot patah lamed sheva mem segol qadma nun dagesh qamats he
change.changeuni: yod sheva shin shin-dot patah lamed sheva mem segol qadma nun dagesh qamats he

notes.note: The image shows no paseq at the end of this word. Signs of a possible erasure in the paseq area are present, however.
BHL has no paseq at the end of this word. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for dagesh in yod.
change.refuni: yod qamats dalet patah merkha ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats
change.changeuni: yod qamats dalet patah merkha ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats

notes.note: No dagesh is apparent in the yod.
BHL has no dagesh in the yod. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine second letter: samekh or sin.
change.refuni: yod hiriq samekh sheva pe dagesh etnachta vav holam qof
change.changeuni: yod hiriq samekh sheva pe dagesh etnachta vav holam qof

notes.note: The second letter is a samekh.
BHL has a samekh as the second letter. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible dagesh in the mem.
change.refuni: mem hiriq yod dagesh qamats dalet sheva final-kaf qamats merkha
change.changeuni: mem hiriq yod dagesh qamats dalet sheva final-kaf qamats merkha

notes.note: The mem contains no dagesh.
BHL has no dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the tav: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: tav holam dehi alef mem patah resh
change.changeuni: tav holam dehi alef mem patah resh

notes.note: The accent under the tav is very pre-positive and transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine position of the ole over the yod or over the ayin:
change.refuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ayin hataf-patah ole bet holam merkha dalet vav dagesh
change.changeuni: vav sheva meteg yod patah ayin hataf-patah ole bet holam merkha dalet vav dagesh

notes.note: The ole is clearly over the ayin.
BHL has the ole over the ayin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Determine the initial letter: kaf or bet.
change.refuni: kaf dagesh hiriq bet sheva lamed hiriq yod maqaf
change.changeuni: kaf dagesh hiriq bet sheva lamed hiriq yod maqaf

notes.note: Although the initial letter isn't as well-rounded as a typical kaf, it lacks the distinctive bulge on the lower left of a bet. It is transcribed as a kaf.
BHL has the first letter as a bet with a dagesh and hiriq. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on the shin: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot dehi vav dagesh ayin hataf-patah final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot dehi vav dagesh ayin hataf-patah final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The text is in poor condition. The light outline of a dehi or tipeha under the shin is apparent, however. This outline is pre-positive and the accent will be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi on the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine whether kaf has a meteg. Add a meteg under the kaf and a transcription note 't'.
change.refuni: samekh qubuts kaf dagesh qamats tav meteg vav holam sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: samekh qubuts kaf meteg dagesh qamats tav meteg vav holam sof-pasuq

notes.note: The text quality is not good. The meteg under the tav is very dark; the mark under the kaf is much lighter, as is the qamats under the kaf. Add a meteg under the kaf and add a transcription note 't'.
BHL has no meteg on the kaf. BHLA has a meteg on both the kaf and the tav.

change.description: Examine vowel under second lamed: patah or segol.
change.refuni: lamed patah shin shin-dot dagesh segol qadma lamed patah gimel space paseq
change.changeuni: lamed patah shin shin-dot dagesh segol qadma lamed patah gimel space paseq

notes.note: The image shows a clear patah under the second lamed.
BHL has a segol under the second lamed. BHLA has a patah under the second lamed.

change.description: Examine accent under the he: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: he dehi vav holam dalet hiriq yod ayin tsere nun vav dagesh
change.changeuni: he dehi vav holam dalet hiriq yod ayin tsere nun vav dagesh

notes.note: The text is of poor quality. A very weak dehi can be seen emerging from the first leg of the he.
BHL has a dehi on the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine accent under the lamed: merkha or meteg.
change.refuni: lamed holam meteg alef maqaf
change.changeuni: lamed holam meteg alef maqaf

notes.note: The image shows the word in question plus its maqaf-joined successor. The text quality is poor; the connecting maqaf is very weak. The mark under the lamed lacks the northeast-to-southwest inclination required to be transcribed as a merkha. The UXLC text already has a note 'm' suggesting the possibility of the accent being a merkha.
BHL has a merkha on the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine accent under the lamed: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: lamed tipeha vav holam
change.changeuni: lamed tipeha vav holam

notes.note: The accent on the lamed is not sufficiently pre-positive to be considered a dehi; it will be transcribed as a tipeha. The UXLC already has a note 'd' on this letter, suggesting the possibility of a dehi.
BHL has a dehi on the lamed. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine the vowel below the he: sheva or hataf-patah.
change.refuni: he sheva meteg dehi mem hiriq yod dagesh qamats mem segol yod final-kaf qamats
change.changeuni: he sheva meteg dehi mem hiriq yod dagesh qamats mem segol yod final-kaf qamats

notes.note: The text is of poor quality with chipped ink. The image shows a sufficiently pre-positive dehi then a sheva then a meteg, three very light markings.
BHL has a dehi then sheva then meteg then patah under the he; a hataf-patah does not fit the markings. BHLA has a dehi then sheva then meteg under the he,

change.description: Examine for possible he after the tav. The letter he is present in both qere and ketiv forms.
change.refuni: yod hiriq dalet dagesh patah tipeha ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats he
change.changeuni: yod hiriq dalet dagesh patah tipeha ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats he

notes.note: The image shows the word in question plus the following word; they are both qere/ketiv forms. Following Masoretic tradition the letters in the body text are the ketiv letters with qere markings. The letters for the qere words are taken from the letters in the left margin: ידעתה then השחר , respectively. The letters on this word are the same in both qere and ketiv forms. That is NOT true of the next word. The next word in the verse adds an initial he in going from ketiv to qere.

BHL has a he after the tav in both the qere and ketiv for this word. The next word has an initial he added in the qere. BHLA has an entry for the first word in this verse, הְֽ֭מִיָּמֶיךָ , it does not comment on this word.

change.description: Examine for possible dagesh in mem. Add dagesh to mem.
change.refuni: tsadi patah lamed sheva mem qamats munah vav segol tav
change.changeuni: tsadi patah lamed sheva mem dagesh qamats munah vav segol tav

notes.note: The dagesh in the mem is dark and well-positioned. Add dagesh to mem.
BHL has no dagesh in the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for revia over bet.
change.refuni: tav qamats geresh-muqdam bet hiriq yod final-nun
change.changeuni: tav qamats geresh-muqdam bet hiriq yod final-nun

notes.note: The image shows no revia above the bet.
BHL has no revia above the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent on shin: dehi or tipeha. Change dehi to tipeha. Add note 'd'.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot holam dehi alef qamats he
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot holam tipeha alef qamats he

notes.note: The accent below the shin isn't sufficiently pre-positive to be taken as a dehi. Change to tipeha and add note 'd'.
BHL has a dehi under the shin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for revia over mem.
change.refuni: shin shin-dot qamats geresh-muqdam mem patah yod hiriq final-mem
change.changeuni: shin shin-dot qamats geresh-muqdam mem patah yod hiriq final-mem

notes.note: No revia is seen above the mem.
BHL has no revia over the mem. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine accent over tav: revia or geresh. Change revia to geresh.
change.refuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam yod qamats dalet patah ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats revia
change.changeuni: vav sheva geresh-muqdam yod qamats dalet patah ayin sheva tav dagesh qamats geresh

notes.note: The accent above the tav looks like it might have been a revia and then corrected to be a geresh. Change the revia to a geresh.
BHL has a revia over the tav. BHLA has a geresh over the tav.

change.description: Examine which letter has meteg acting as siluq: lamed or het.
change.refuni: mem sheva lamed tsere meteg het qamats he sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: mem sheva lamed tsere meteg het qamats he sof-pasuq

notes.note: The meteg acting as siluq is under the lamed.
BHL has a meteg acting as siluq under the het. BHLA has a meteg acting as a siluq under the lamed.

change.description: Examine accent under the bet: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam
change.changeuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam

notes.note: The accent under the bet is very slightly pre-positive, but will be taken as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the bet . BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine accent under the bet: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam
change.changeuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam

notes.note: The accent under the bet is sufficiently pre-positive to be taken as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for revia over the resh.
change.refuni: alef segol geresh-muqdam bet sheva resh qamats revia he
change.changeuni: alef segol geresh-muqdam bet sheva resh qamats revia he

notes.note: The image has an odd-shaped blob over the resh. A line is touching the top of the resh; this is the meteg from the last word of the previous verse, יֶאֱסֹֽף׃ . A revia over the resh is transcribed.
BHL has a revia over the resh. BHLA has no revia over the resh and has a question mark in parentheses, "(?)".

change.description: Examine for possible dagesh in tav.
change.refuni: tav dagesh sheva dalet vav dagesh shin shin-dot segol meteg he qamats sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: tav dagesh sheva dalet vav dagesh shin shin-dot segol meteg he qamats sof-pasuq

notes.note: A dagesh is clear in the tav.
BHL has a dagesh in the tav. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine markings under the he.
change.refuni: he sheva meteg dehi tav patah resh sheva ayin hiriq yod shin shin-dot segol nun dagesh vav dagesh
change.changeuni: he sheva meteg dehi tav patah resh sheva ayin hiriq yod shin shin-dot segol nun dagesh vav dagesh

notes.note: The image shows a dehi then sheva then meteg under the he.
BHL has a dehi then sheva then meteg then patah under the he; 4 markings. BHLA has a dehi then sheva then meteg under the he; 3 markings.

change.description: Examine for revia over the resh.
change.refuni: shin sin-dot qamats geresh-muqdam resh hiriq yod final-mem
change.changeuni: shin sin-dot qamats geresh-muqdam resh hiriq yod final-mem

notes.note: The image shows no revia over the resh.
BHL has no revia over the resh. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine possible meteg after qamats on gimmel.
change.refuni: gimel qamats meteg alef munah vav holam final-nun
change.changeuni: gimel qamats meteg alef munah vav holam final-nun

notes.note: The qamats under the gimel is followed by a variable-width vertical line. It has the correct length and position to be a meteg.
BHL has no meteg after qamats on gimel. BHLA has a meteg after the qamats on the gimel; the BHLA note has a question mark in parentheses, "(?)".

change.description: Examine accent below the he: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef
change.changeuni: he dehi vav dagesh alef

notes.note: The accent under the he is sufficiently pre-positive to be a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the he. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible revia over the sin.
change.refuni: he qamats geresh-muqdam ayin holam shin sin-dot vav holam
change.changeuni: he qamats geresh-muqdam ayin holam shin sin-dot vav holam

notes.note: The image shows 3 dots over the sin: the first dot is the holam, the second dot is from a qamats on the previous line (40:18.4, גְּ֝רָמָ֗יו ), the third dot is the sin dot. No revia appears above the sin.
BHL has no revia over the sin. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine for possible meteg after segol on lamed.
change.refuni: lamed segol meteg het hataf-segol yod vav holam sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: lamed segol meteg het hataf-segol yod vav holam sof-pasuq

notes.note: The image shows a meteg after the segol under the lamed.
BHL has a meteg after the segol on the lamed; it has a meteg under the vav, too. BHLA also has a meteg after the segol under the lamed; but no meteg under the vav.

change.description: Examine accent under the bet: dehi or tipeha.
change.refuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam
change.changeuni: bet dagesh dehi vav holam

notes.note: The accent under the bet is sufficiently pre-positive to be transcribed as a dehi.
BHL has a dehi under the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: * Examine for meteg following qamats under the het.
change.refuni: het qamats tav sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: het qamats tav sof-pasuq

notes.note: The image shows no meteg following the qamats. The UXLC has a transcription note 'c' on the het.
BHL has a meteg following the qamats under the het. BHLA has no meteg following the qamats under the bet.

change.description: * Examine which letter has the darga: vav or yod.
change.refuni: vav patah yod dagesh darga holam samekh segol final-pe
change.changeuni: vav patah yod dagesh darga holam samekh segol final-pe

notes.note: The text quality is very poor on this word. A light, but distinct, darga can be seen under the yod. Due to limited space and low text quality assigning the letter of the darga is difficult.
BHL has the darga under the vav immediately after the patah. BHLA has no entry for this verse.

change.description: Examine bet for possible dagesh. Remove dagesh from bet.
change.refuni: bet dagesh qamats nun meteg vav holam tav sof-pasuq
change.changeuni: bet qamats nun meteg vav holam tav sof-pasuq

notes.note: The text is of poor quality. No dagesh is apparent in the bet.
BHL has a dagesh in the bet. BHLA has no entry for this verse.
